_meta.note: Frozen Figma variable defs for the Cards page node. Card shadow is deliberately zeroed (FND-033, register-only). Card-scoped button variant here is 12px label / 20x8 padding (smaller than the global button).

variables.-loop shadows/cards: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: effects/shadow/default, offset: (card/shadow/x-position, card/shadow/y-position), radius: card/shadow/blur, spread: card/shadow/spead)
variables.Body/Eyebrow/Small: Font(family: "Open Sans", style: Bold, size: Font-size/150, weight: 700, lineHeight: 1.25, letterSpacing: 0)
variables.Heading/H2/Base: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Bold, size: Font-size/1000, weight: Heading/Font Weight, lineHeight: 1.12, letterSpacing: -3)
variables.Body/Text/Medium/Narrow: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/500, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.25, letterSpacing: -0.25)
variables.Body/Text/Medium/Regular: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/500, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: -0.25)
variables.Body/Text/Base/Narrow: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/300, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.25, letterSpacing: 0)
variables.Body/Text/Base/Regular: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/300, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 0)
variables.Body/Text/Small/Regular: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/200, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 0)
variables.Body/Text/Tiny/Narrow: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/100, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.25, letterSpacing: 0.25)
variables.Body/Text/Large/Narrow: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: Font-size/600, weight: Body/Font Weight/Regular, lineHeight: 1.25, letterSpacing: -0.35)
variables..UI Component/Button/Label (card-scoped): Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Bold, size: 12, weight: 700, lineHeight: 24, letterSpacing: -0.5)
